name: Bitcos Pro
description: Bitcos Pro (BOS) is a decentralized blockchain project built on the BNB Smart Chain that operates as a BEP-20 utility token within an ecosystem designed to support staking mechanisms, decentralized payment and swap functionality, and referral-based participation through smart contract logic, with an emphasis on transparent on-chain operations, predefined token supply controls, non-custodial interaction, and gradual ecosystem development governed by publicly verifiable contracts rather than centralized management or discretionary intervention.
